reasoning: I came back from Pune four years ago believing Modi meant building something real. Instead, I've watched both sides turn everything into performance — Ram Mandir ceremonies instead of roads, CAA certificates five days before elections instead of jobs, Sandeshkhali assaults weaponized by both sides while the women get lost in the noise. Shantanu Thakur, Biswajit Das, it doesn't matter — they're all just pieces being moved around. I've learned what competent government looks like, and this isn't it. Neither side is serious about actually governing. I refuse to vote for theatre.
primary_drivers: Both TMC and BJP prioritize winning elections over actual governance and service delivery
Systematic disillusionment with BJP's failure to deliver 'building government' he witnessed in Pune
Recognition that political performance (ceremonies, raids, last-minute certificates) replaces real work
